history.summary: Answered Pond's 4 lifecycle questions + wrote entity-status-map.md (the 'one map to rule them all' Pond asked for). KEY: formally defined PRD (ใบสั่งผลิต / Production Order) as a distinct entity — the mockups already use PRD per line (PRD-000091=line1, PRD-000088=line2 of PO-181, auto-created on PO Confirm) but status-journeys hadn't named it. ANSWERS: (1) create non-draft PO = 'ยืนยันแล้ว (Confirmed)'; sending to production is AUTOMATIC — system auto-creates PRD per line at status 'รับงาน' (production does NOT press accept, just presses 'เริ่มผลิต' when ready) [default, confirm]; (2) PRD number created at PO Confirmed, 1 line item = 1 PRD, format PRD-{YYYYMM}-{NNNNNN}; (3) Batch created when production presses 'เริ่มผลิต' — Batch(กำลังผลิต)→PRD(กำลังผลิต); Batch QC-pass→PRD line ready; all PRD ready→PO Ready-to-Deliver; Batch QC-fail→PRD Rework + gen next Batch run; (4) NO — 'ส่งตรวจ QC' only changes the EXISTING Batch (กำลังผลิต→รอ QC); Batch is created once per run at 'เริ่มผลิต' (+new run only on rework), NOT at send-to-QC. RELATIONSHIP: 1 PO : N PRD (N=line count) : M Batch (M≥N, +1 per rework run). entity-status-map.md contains: 11 entities each with own statuses/role-who-changes/mockup-page/doc-format/when-created; a 17-row cascade table; a single-line end-to-end text diagram (customer→PO→PRD→Batch→QC→Shipment/DN→Invoice→Paid); a mockup-conformance check (2 UX fixes: PRD numbering format PRD-000091→PRD-{YYYYMM}-{NNNNNN}; po-detail should show PRD per line) — flagged as fix list, did not edit mockups. Synced status-journeys.md §3 (renamed to PRD + Batch, added relationship + pointer to entity-status-map.md as single source of truth). 3 lifecycle questions batched to Pond with defaults (not blocking). history.summary: COURSE-CORRECTION ACK (Stage-2 prep, still no build). Absorbed Pond's new output format (one functional-spec web: use case -> API + table/field + linked Architecture page w/ service & system diagram; ADRs remain the decision record) and new business rules (PRD-on-manual-accept, NEGATIVE STOCK, soft-delete+reference-guard, gapless) plus all 9 NFR answers. Key architecture position returned to dispatcher: model stock as an APPEND-ONLY stock_movement ledger (on-hand derived; materialized balance via atomic relative delta) — this makes negative stock natural, makes GR 'compensate-negative' automatic netting, and REMOVES the check-then-decrement race that caused DEF-09 (load 50 concurrent/>200 PO/day is light for single-PC MySQL; only remaining lock = gapless counter). Raised 3 guardrails on the web format (single source of truth -> repo OpenAPI+DDL post-approval; ADRs stay normative; self-contained SVG diagrams) and revised effort to ~12-16 dev-days + new ADR 'Stock Ledger & Negative Stock'. Two questions for Pond I cannot decide: (1) GMP raw-lot->batch linkage when material is consumed before its lot exists (recommend auto FIFO back-allocation at GR), (2) whether inventory valuation/COGS is in scope (recommend NOT — use BOM snapshot cost, quantity-only ledger). Deletion-policy Q1-Q5 are business-only (no tech blocker); soft-delete + reference-guard done as a base-repository pattern like generic audit. Deferred all deliverables until Gate 1. Did NOT touch feature-level status.
